title: Mitcham valuation notes
transcript_text:
Sarah Mitchell: Hi Fiona, thanks for showing me around. So this is on High Street in Mitcham — postcode CR4 1AA.

Ms Fiona Thompson: Yes, we've been here five years on High Street.

Sarah Mitchell: It's a two-bed terrace, needs some cosmetic refresh in the kitchen.

Ms Fiona Thompson: We're downsizing after the kids left. Not in a huge rush — maybe six months.

Ms Fiona Thompson: We were thinking somewhere around £425,000 but open to your advice.

Sarah Mitchell: I'll pull local comparables for CR4 and we can discuss marketing strategy.
summary_text: High Street Mitcham CR4 1AA valuation. Downsizing, flexible timeline ~6 months, price hint £425k.
